verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Lord, I offer my life to you, Everything I've been through, Use it for your glory, Lord I offer my days to you, Lifting my praise to you, As a pleasing sacrifice, Lord I offer you my life.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: All that I am, all that I have I lay them down before you, oh Lord All my regrets, all my acclaims The joy and the pain, I'm making them yours.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Things in the past, things yet unseen Wishes and dreams that are yet to come true All of my heart, all of my praise My heart and my hands are lifted to you.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: What can we give That you have not given? And what do we have That is not already yours? All we possess Are these lives we're living That's what we give to you, Lord.
